name: Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, cocoa, sugar.
2. Add egg yokes.
3. Gradually add milk until the dry ingredients and eggs are well mixed.
4. Add vanilla and melted butter.
5. Cook over medium heat until thick, stirring constantly.
6. Pour into a baked pie shell.
7. Top with meringue and brown.
8. Makes 2 - 8 inch pies from filling.
